prompt: In two or three sentences, explain what makes a good note-to-self when you know you will forget everything before reading it.

results.response: Writing a good note-to-self is a process of taking some time to reflect on your goals and priorities while still being mindful that you might forget things in the long run. To make sure you don't lose track, you can start by listing down all the important tasks or responsibilities for the upcoming week, then prioritize them accordingly. Additionally, incorporating specific strategies like setting reminders, using alarms, or even practicing mindfulness exercises during your daily routine can help keep you focused and motivated. Remember, as always, the key is consistency and patience in getting better at self-motivation and organization.
